events.event: Case auto-created by the Target Visibility Gate, promoted from candidate T-AU-2026-00070 (Metropolitan Collieries Pty Ltd). Promotion required at least one independently verified source_evidence entry — see dfapti/rules/factualism-audit.md.

Manual evidence sweep found a separate NSW EPA Clean-Up Notice (7-8 August 2023) for a distinct landslip incident at the Helensburgh mine, discharging sediment into Camp Gully Creek - a different event from the September/October 2022 pollution already recorded.
